clusters.title: Short-term trends in semiconductors

stocks.ai_explanation: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSM) is a leading semiconductor manufacturer. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is a major player in the semiconductor industry. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
ASML Holding NV is a Dutch multinational technology company specializing in lithography systems. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
